visa_types.name: Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
When submitting documents, you must provide color photocopies of all documents and pages containing passport details.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > kaz > en > Table:Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 17 890 tenge (Inclusive at VAT 16 %) payable online.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Kazakhstani tenge is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 calendar days to process the visa application. According to the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa Code), the period of consideration of your visa application by respective Consular authority may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for a short term (up to 90 days in any 180 days). Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for a short term (up to 90 days in any 180 days). Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[svk > kaz > en > Table:Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 17 890 tenge (Inclusive at VAT 16 %) payable online.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Kazakhstani tenge is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
When submitting documents, you must provide color photocopies of all documents and pages containing passport details.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 calendar days to process the visa application. According to the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa Code), the period of consideration of your visa application by respective Consular authority may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A national visa is the permission granted by the Slovak Republic authorising its holder for the stay in the territory of the Slovak Republic for the duration of the validity of the visa and in other Member States for a period not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period under the conditions stipulated in the Schengen Borders Code. The national visa may be issued with maximum validity of 1 year. 
To obtain information about applying for a national visa, please follow the link:
https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A national visa is the permission granted by the Slovak Republic authorising its holder for the stay in the territory of the Slovak Republic for the duration of the validity of the visa and in other Member States for a period not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period under the conditions stipulated in the Schengen Borders Code. The national visa may be issued with maximum validity of 1 year. 
To obtain information about applying for a national visa, please follow the link:
https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa) 

## Visa Fees

[svk > kaz > en > Table:Family reunification > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 17 890 tenge (Inclusive at VAT 16%) payable in cash or card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Kazakhstani tenge is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
List of documents required – Click here
For more information :  https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa)
When submitting documents, you must provide colour photocopies of all documents and pages containing passport details.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application Form
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 17 890 tenge (Inclusive at VAT 16 %) payable online.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Kazakhstani tenge is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
When submitting documents, you must provide color photocopies of all documents and pages containing passport details.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 calendar days to process the visa application. According to the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa Code), the period of consideration of your visa application by respective Consular authority may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

A national visa is the permission granted by the Slovak Republic authorising its holder for the stay in the territory of the Slovak Republic for the duration of the validity of the visa and in other Member States for a period not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period under the conditions stipulated in the Schengen Borders Code. ## Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that family members of EU citizen are kindly requested to contact Embassy of Slovakia in Astana, Kazakhstan pertaining to submission of their documents for visa.

## Visa Fees

- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are biometric exempt.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[svk > kaz > en > Table:Business/Conference > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 17 890 tenge (Inclusive at VAT 16 %) payable online.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Kazakhstani tenge is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
When submitting documents, you must provide color photocopies of all documents and pages containing passport details.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 calendar days to process the visa application. According to the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa Code), the period of consideration of your visa application by respective Consular authority may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
